name: nosuckshell
description: Monorepo root — desktop app lives in apps/desktop

scripts.tauri:dev: node scripts/ensure-desktop-deps.cjs && npm --prefix apps/desktop run tauri:dev
scripts.tauri:build: node scripts/ensure-desktop-deps.cjs && npm --prefix apps/desktop run tauri:build
scripts.desktop:dev: node scripts/ensure-desktop-deps.cjs && npm --prefix apps/desktop run dev
scripts.desktop:build: node scripts/ensure-desktop-deps.cjs && npm --prefix apps/desktop run build
scripts.desktop:test: node scripts/ensure-desktop-deps.cjs && npm --prefix apps/desktop run test
